news.headline: INVL Technology transferred 1,143 shares to employees on Feb 24, 2025, updating total issued shares.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, INVL Technology has transferred 1,143 of its shares to employees of its subsidiaries as part of an option agreement. The employees now have the right to exercise these options. As of the same date, the total number of issued shares by INVL Technology was disclosed.

news.headline: DeFi facilitates the selection of top-performing robots for various roles amidst rising demand for humanoid robots in different sectors.
news.summary: The increasing need for humanoid robots in various sectors has led to the adoption of DeFi-inspired systems. These systems provide a decentralized, transparent, and efficient method to pair suitable robots with specific tasks. This advancement comes as demand for humanoid robots continues to rise, with key industries looking for innovative solutions to match the right robots to the right jobs.

DeFAI must scale safely as AI advances. Risks loom amidst potential growth; key numbers are at risk. #DeFI #AI #scaling
news.summary: The emergence of DeFAI is transforming the landscape of decentralized finance (DeFi) as AI agents play a key role in reshaping the industry. This rise presents substantial opportunities, but also comes with notable risks. To ensure safe scaling, it is crucial to tackle issues such as hallucinations and systemic failures. The integration of AI in DeFi is expected to bring about significant changes in the sector, with potential benefits and risks to consider.

PBF Energy (NYSE:PBF) to participate in Scotiabank Global Energy Conference on Feb 26, 2025.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, Parsippany, N.J. - PBF Energy Inc. (NYSE: PBF) revealed that its management team will be taking part in the Scotiabank Global Energy Conference on February 26, 2025. During the conference, important information will be shared regarding the company's performance and future prospects. Presentation materials will also be shared with investors for further insights.

news.headline: Gallant Capital acquires Navient Corp.'s Govt Services division for tech-enabled business processing; leader in tolling/parking technology and services.
news.summary: A private equity firm, Gallant Capital Partners, has completed the acquisition of the Government Services business segment of Navient Corporation (Nasdaq: NAVI). The acquired company, known as NGS, specializes in providing tech-enabled outsourcing services to various government entities in the United States. NGS is particularly prominent in the tolling and parking technology sector and delivers essential services such as call center support to government agencies. This acquisition marks a significant move in the government services market.

news.headline: SGI Global appoints Patrick McElwain as new CSO, with 27 years of federal law enforcement experience.
news.summary: SGI Global, LLC (SGI) has appointed Mr. Patrick McElwain as its new Chief Strategy Officer (CSO) in Fairfax, Virginia. With over 27 years of federal law enforcement experience, Mr. McElwain previously served as a special agent with HSI and the U.S. Customs Service. From May 2023 to January 2025, he held the position of Deputy Executive Associate Director (Deputy EAD) at HSI. HSI is the main investigative unit of the Department of Homeland Security.

news.headline: Chinese Auto Valley hosts global launch of Wuhan-made auto brands. VOYAH Ultra-Fast Charging Station ranks top globally.
news.summary: In a recent report by Changjiang Daily from Wuhan, China on February 24, 2025, it was announced that the VOYAH Ultra-Fast Charging Station has surpassed all others to become the top-ranking station globally for charging speed. This achievement was highlighted at the Chinese Auto Valley • Press Conference held at Dongfeng Motor Global Innovation on February 23. The event marked the global launch of auto brands manufactured in Wuhan, showcasing the city's advancements in the automotive industry.

news.headline: US 10-year bonds show supply impact, not growth surge: BMO's Davis.
Avo, a smart-on-FHIR platform integrated with MEDITECH, gains new partnerships; Moab Regional Hospital among clients.
news.summary: In New York on February 24, 2025, Avo, a clinician support platform integrated with MEDITECH and using smart-on-FHIR technology, is gaining attention in the MEDITECH community due to its recent customer acquisitions and partnerships. One notable addition is Moab Regional Hospital, a Level IV trauma center and Critical Access Hospital located in a rural area. This development highlights Avo's increasing presence as it continues to collaborate with more healthcare providers.

news.headline: Perfect Game partners with Cincy Flames to expand presence in the Midwest, boosting youth baseball opportunities.
news.summary: Today, in Sanford, Florida, Perfect Game, a leading youth baseball and softball platform and scouting service, revealed a new collaboration with the Cincy Flames, a renowned high school baseball tournament organization. This partnership brings together two significant entities in the baseball world, aiming to enhance opportunities for young players. Perfect Game, known as the largest platform for youth baseball and softball, joins forces with the esteemed Cincy Flames to further elevate the baseball landscape. This association is anticipated to have a substantial impact, as both organizations boast significant influence in the realm of youth baseball, coming together to offer enhanced experiences for players.

news.headline: Adam Back criticizes ‘EVM mis-design’ for Bybit hack, sparking debate between Bitcoin and Ethereum supporters.
news.summary: The recent Bybit hack has initiated a discussion among supporters of Bitcoin and Ethereum. Notably, Adam Back has attributed the security breach to vulnerabilities in the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM), while some individuals are highlighting weaknesses in multisig protocols. This incident has drawn attention due to the substantial loss of [insert amount here] worth of funds, prompting a reassessment of security measures in the cryptocurrency space.

news.headline: DentaQuest earns 2nd consecutive URAC Dental Plan Accreditation, showcasing commitment to quality healthcare.
news.summary: Today, DentaQuest, a subsidiary of Sun Life U.S., proudly declared their achievement of receiving full URAC Dental Plan Accreditation on Feb. 24, 2025. This accreditation exemplifies their steadfast dedication to providing top-tier healthcare services. URAC, a reputable independent organization, granted this recognition to DentaQuest, highlighting their commitment to excellence in dental care.

news.headline: Haliey Welch's crypto venture turns sour after allegations of involvement in a scam, showcasing the risks in the industry.
news.summary: Haliey Welch, who dived into the world of cryptocurrency with much excitement, is now facing backlash due to allegations of participating in a crypto scheme.

news.headline: New rice protein, Oryzatein 2.0 by Axiom Foods, hits the market with no lead; provides clean and high-quality option.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025 in Los Angeles, Axiom Foods, a leading plant protein manufacturer, has achieved breakthroughs in cleanliness standards, resulting in a pristine color, enhanced solubility, and smooth texture. This advancement comes after the Clean Label Project released a report on the top and bottom protein powder products.

news.headline: Tesla stock surges on China FSD news, 'containable' DOGE impact by Elon Musk with FSD set for rollout in China soon.
news.summary: The stock price of Tesla increased following news that the electric vehicle company plans to introduce Full Self-Driving (FSD) technology in China in the near future. Analyst Dan Ives remarked that the influence of Elon Musk's involvement with Dogecoin is limited and will not alter the trajectory of the EV company significantly. This boost in Tesla stock came amidst positive sentiment regarding the potential rollout of FSD in China, emphasizing the company's commitment to innovative technology. The impact of Musk's actions on Dogecoin is seen as manageable, according to Ives, a long-time supporter of Tesla.

news.headline: Express Employment Professionals wins Best of Staffing Client and Talent Awards, also earns Diamond Award for client satisfaction.
news.summary: Express Employment Professionals in Oklahoma City has received recognition for their exceptional performance, winning the Best of Staffing Client and Talent Awards presented by ClearlyRated. This victory adds to their impressive track record, as they maintain their status as a Diamond Award winner for client satisfaction. This achievement showcases Express Employment Professionals' commitment to providing top-notch services to both clients and talent in the employment industry.

news.headline: CoinShares has no exposure to Bybit exchange, confirmed on 24th Feb 2024. Listed on Nasdaq Stockholm (CS) and US OTCQX (CNSRF).
news.summary: On February 24th, 2024 in Saint Helier, Jersey, CoinShares International Limited, a prominent global investment company focusing on digital assets, stated that it does not have any involvement with the Bybit exchange. The company, listed on Nasdaq Stockholm as CS and US OTCQX as CNSRF, is ensuring transparency in its operations.

news.headline: Strategy Inc. buys 20,356 bitcoins for $1.99B at avg of $97,514/BTC, boosting total BTC to 499,096 bought at $33.1B. Yield now at 6.9%.
news.summary: Strategy Incorporated (NASDAQ:MSTR) has recently acquired a significant amount of Bitcoin, purchasing 20,356 BTC for approximately $1.99 billion at an average price of $97,514 per Bitcoin between February 18 and February 23. This move has resulted in a year-to-date BTC yield of 6.9%. Following this acquisition, the company now holds a total of 499,096 Bitcoin as of February 23, obtained for a total of $33.1 billion at an average price of $66,357 per Bitcoin. The purchase of Bitcoin was financed through the proceeds of a $2.0 billion private offering of 0% convertible senior notes due 2030. This significant investment demonstrates Strategy Incorporated's continued interest and confidence in the cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: Global RFID in Healthcare market valued at US$6.9 Billion in 2024, projected to reach US$15.7 Billion by 2030, growing at 14.6% CAGR.
news.summary: Dublin - ResearchAndMarkets.com has included the "RFID in Healthcare - Global Strategic Business Report" in its offerings. The global RFID in Healthcare market was valued at $6.9 billion in 2024 and is estimated to grow to $15.7 billion by 2030, with a projected CAGR of 14.6% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers insights into market trends, drivers, and future forecasts, aiding in making informed business choices. The technology focused on is Radio Frequency Identification (RFID).

news.headline: Investors urged by Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP to contact for losses in securities class action against Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. MPWR (NASDAQ). Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: In RADNOR, PA on February 24, 2025, Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP announced a securities class action lawsuit against Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: MPWR). The lawsuit is on behalf of investors who bought shares of Monolithic. For more information, investors can visit the law firm's website at www.ktmc.com.

news.headline: Wintermute pulled out $38M SOL from Binance before $2B Solana unlock, sparking worries amid declining market sentiment.
news.summary: Prior to a $2 billion token unlock, Wintermute pulled out $40 million in SOL, sparking worries about potential selling pressure amid deteriorating market sentiment.

news.headline: Josh Snowhorn, Founder of Quantum Loophole, joins Telescent's Board of Directors in California.
news.summary: Telescent, based in Irvine, California, has welcomed Josh Snowhorn, the Founder and CEO of Quantum Loophole, to its Board of Directors. This new addition brings valuable expertise to the team and aims to enhance the company's strategic direction.

news.headline: Batteries Plus launches inaugural Plus Games, offering over $30,000 in prizes to boost franchise performance.
news.summary: A prominent battery retail franchise in the country is set to give out more than $30,000 in prizes as part of gamified training, sales, and team-building activities. The announcement was made by Batteries Plus, a well-known consumer and business specialized battery franchise. This initiative aims to enhance employee engagement and performance. Additional details of the program include the distribution of prizes through various challenges. The launch event is scheduled for February 24, 2025, in Hartland, Wisconsin.

news.headline: MWC 2025 highlights the advancement towards Mobile AI era with 5G-A and AI technologies, with 2024 seeing commercial use.
news.summary: In Barcelona, Spain on February 24, 2025, an announcement was made regarding the combination of 5G-Advanced (5G-A) and AI technologies, signaling the beginning of the mobile AI era and a significant development for communication networks. The year 2024 was notable as it saw the first official deployment of 5G-A technology. This integration is a crucial step towards a more intelligent global network landscape.

news.headline: Celo, Chainlink, Hyperlane introduce crosschain USDT on OP Superchain, enhancing interoperability for developers.
news.summary: Developers are increasingly drawn to stablecoin interoperability as a significant factor in simplifying the expenses and settlement challenges of transactions. The ability to seamlessly transfer stablecoins across multiple platforms has gained traction, with a notable impact on reducing transaction costs and improving efficiency for developers. This trend underscores the growing importance of interoperability in the fintech space, with the potential to significantly streamline processes and drive adoption.

news.headline: VAYK plans to capitalize on Airbnb's strong growth, with potential for service upgrades amid favorable conditions.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Vaycaychella, Inc. (OTC Pink: VAYK) recently praised the latest financial report from Airbnb. VAYK's management sees Airbnb's strong growth as a positive factor for the rollout of VAYK's enhanced service offering. The company is optimistic about the opportunities presented by Airbnb's impressive performance.

news.headline: Static Media acquires Jalopnik.com, a popular automotive brand, to expand its presence in the auto vertical.
news.summary: A press release from Indianapolis on February 24, 2025, revealed that Static Media has acquired Jalopnik.com, a popular automotive brand. Known for its focus on car culture, Jalopnik.com is a digital platform beloved by enthusiasts. This acquisition marks a major milestone for Static Media as it expands its reach.

news.headline: Wingstop introduces new crispy tenders to replace basic ones, with 1M free tenders available nationwide.
news.summary: In Dallas on February 24, 2025, Wingstop (NASDAQ: WING) announced the launch of their new, crispier chicken tenders, which are now being offered across the country. These revamped chicken tenders aim to revolutionize the flavor experience for fans, departing from traditional bland options to introduce Wingstop's crispy tenders. Hand sauced and tossed in innovative flavors, these new tenders promise to elevate the chicken tender game nationwide.

news.headline: CivicaScript® cuts prices for generic Abiraterone tablets due to reduced manufacturing costs, benefiting members and patients.
news.summary: CivicaScript®, a nonprofit organization in LEHI, Utah, declared on Feb. 24, 2025, that they have decreased the price of their primary product due to reduced manufacturing expenses. This move aims to offer more affordable generic medications to consumers in the U.S. This initiative intends to benefit members and patients by providing cost-effective healthcare solutions.

news.headline: Mohr Capital buys two industrial buildings in 18-year sale-leaseback, securing vital real estate in established markets.
news.summary: A joint venture has recently acquired vital real estate in established markets in Dallas. The acquisition, completed by Mohr Capital, a firm based in Dallas, involved the purchase of two industrial properties through an 18-year sale leaseback agreement. This move marks a significant milestone for the company and demonstrates its commitment to expanding its real estate portfolio. The transaction underscores the value of the properties and the potential for long-term growth.

news.headline: Kroll expands investment banking with new Equity Capital Markets practice led by Locust Hill Advisor Founder, David Galper.
news.summary: In New York on February 24, 2025, Kroll, a prominent global financial and risk advisory solutions provider, revealed the establishment of its Equity Capital Markets Advisory practice post the procurement of Locust Hill Advisors. Headed by David Galper, the founder, this new advisory practice aims to bolster Kroll's services in this sector.

news.headline: Win a grocery gift card from Knorr to create delicious home-cooked meals when fast food fails. Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: Enter for a chance to win a grocery gift card in Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey on February 24, 2025. Say goodbye to fast food mishaps and opt for simple home cooking with fresh ingredients delivered to your doorstep. Enjoy the taste of homemade meals instead of half-prepared burgers, broken burritos, and disappointing pizzas.

news.headline: Pender Capital ends 2024 with 37 active loans totaling $504.1 million in their Real Estate Credit Fund.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on February 24, 2025, Pender Capital revealed that their Real Estate Fund ended 2024 on a high note, boasting 37 active loans amounting to $504.1 million. Pender Capital focuses on offering short-term, senior secured commercial bridge loans.

news.headline: FDA authorizes Aptitude's Metrix® COVID/Flu test for over-the-counter use. Received Emergency Use Authorization.
news.summary: Today in Santa Barbara, California, Aptitude Medical Systems, Inc. revealed that they have been granted Emergency Use Authorization (EUA) by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for their latest molecular Metrix® COVID/Flu multiplex test. This advanced test is designed to detect both COVID and flu viruses simultaneously. The EUA allows Aptitude to begin using the test in emergency situations.

news.headline: Capital Bancorp, Inc. has finished the operational conversion of Integrated Financial Holdings, Inc., incorporating IFH customer accounts.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, in Rockville, Maryland, Capital Bancorp, Inc. ("CBNK") successfully finalized the incorporation of Integrated Financial Holdings, Inc. ("IFH") into its operations and systems. This move involved the seamless transition of IFH customer accounts into CBNK’s offerings.

news.headline: SEALSQ partners to bring quantum computing to cloud, making it accessible to more users, Feb. 24, 2025. #LAES #SEALSQCorp.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, in Geneva, Switzerland, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) stated that it is collaborating with partners to introduce quantum computing to the cloud. SEALSQ, a company specializing in Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology products, aims to increase the accessibility of this innovative technology to a wider audience, including businesses, researchers, and developers. The move signifies a strategic effort to democratize quantum computing and its potential benefits.

news.headline: Drugs Made in America Acquisition Corp. forms an advisory team for acquiring revenue-generating businesses to promote the production of drugs in the USA, creating jobs and securing a resilient supply chain.
news.summary: Fort Lauderdale, FL, February 24, 2025 - Drugs Made in America Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: DMAAU) has established an advisory team with the goal of acquiring a well-managed, revenue-generating business to establish an "End to End" production, manufacturing, and distribution platform for drugs made in America. Led by Lynn Stockwell, CEO of DMAAU, the team will actively seek to acquire a business or merge with one to position itself as a competitive producer of American-made drugs. The move aims to bring drug production back to the USA, creating jobs, reducing national security risks, and ensuring that Americans have access to clean, affordable medications through a secure domestic supply chain.

news.headline: Global ATM Security Market expected to reach USD 32.69 Billion by 2034 at 6.8% CAGR, up from USD 23.25 Billion in 2024.
news.summary: The global ATM security market is set to grow significantly, with a projected value of around USD 32.69 Billion by 2034, from approximately USD 23.25 Billion in 2024. The market is expected to reach USD 24.90 Billion in 2025, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 6.8% during the forecast period of 2025 to 2034. The growth is driven by the increasing demand for secure and reliable access to cash through ATMs, advancements in technology, introduction of Smart ATMs with enhanced security features, and the need for automation in the financial sector. Financial institutions and ATM operators are implementing various security measures such as anti-skimming technology, surveillance systems, and transaction monitoring to prevent fraud. Regulatory compliance standards also create a demand for robust ATM security solutions. However, this growth comes with additional expenses for banks, such as implementing new technologies and security protocols. The demand for currency may decrease in the future due to various payment options, but the need for ATM security remains critical.

news.headline: Global medical insurance market to grow at 9.6% CAGR, reaching $4.4 trillion by 2033 from $1.7 trillion in 2023. Factors driving growth include demand for insurance solutions, health awareness, and medical tech advancements. Challenges include high premiums and regulatory issues.
news.summary: A report by Allied Market Research predicts the global medical insurance market to grow from $1.7 trillion in 2023 to $4.4 trillion by 2033, with a CAGR of 9.6% from 2024 to 2033. Factors driving growth include the increasing demand for insurance solutions, health awareness, and medical technology advancements. Challenges such as high premiums and regulatory issues may hinder market growth, but opportunities like digital transformation and telemedicine are expected to boost the market. The report covers segments like age group, distribution channel, claim type, and regions in the forecast period of 2024 to 2033.

news.headline: MOO Imbalance
Blackstone to acquire Safe Harbor Marinas for $5.65B; Safe Harbor owns 138 marinas in US and Puerto Rico, industry leader.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Blackstone revealed that its funds are set to acquire Safe Harbor Marinas, the leading marina and superyacht servicing company in the U.S., from Sun Communities, Inc., for a significant $5.65 billion. Safe Harbor, with 138 marinas in the U.S. and Puerto Rico, holds a prominent position in the boat storage and servicing sector. This move further solidifies Blackstone's position in the infrastructure investment realm.

news.headline: CloudPay named Leader in 2024 SPARK Matrix™ for MCP by QKS Group, excelling in tech & customer impact.
news.summary: CloudPay has received high ratings for technology excellence and customer impact in a recent evaluation. The QKS Group SPARK Matrix™, which ranks Multi-Country Payroll (MCP) providers, recognized CloudPay for its comprehensive technology and customer experience management. The evaluation assessed various parameters, highlighting CloudPay's strong performance in delivering quality solutions and services. This recognition underscores the company's position as a leading player in the industry, with impressive scores reflecting its commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: BoE Saporta: BoE is monitoring rise in SONIA rate.
Israel Foreign Affairs Minister Sa'artruce: An extension is possible in exchange for more hostages.
QCR Holdings, Inc. CEO Larry J. Helling retiring, Todd A. Gipple to take over as CEO post May 22, 2025 shareholder meeting. Nick W. Anderson to become CFO.
news.summary: QCR Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: QCRH) announced on Feb. 24, 2025, that Larry J. Helling will retire as Chief Executive Officer of the Company and Cedar Rapids Bank and Trust Company following the annual stockholders meeting on May 22, 2025. Mr. Helling will also step down from the boards of directors of both entities at that time. Todd A. Gipple, the current President and Chief Financial Officer, will succeed Mr. Helling as President and Chief Executive Officer of the Company. Moreover, Nick W. Anderson, the current Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer, will take over as Chief Financial Officer when Mr. Gipple assumes the role of Chief Executive Officer.
